metadata.description: Shared skills marketplace for the ecom-business team. Skills are organized by functional domain.

plugins.name: general
plugins.description: General-purpose skills recommended for everyone on the team. Includes team-skills-add and team-skills-browse for interacting with this marketplace without touching git.

plugins.name: team-build-kit
plugins.description: The three-gate build lifecycle: memo (why) -> prd (what) -> build (how) -> ship (safe to rely on). For building tools you trust without being an engineer.

plugins.description: Skills for copywriters. (Placeholder - awaiting first contribution.)
